title: stelis yanganensis
intro: Stelis yanganensis is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Stelis yanganensis include treating skin conditions such as eczema, wounds, and ulcers, as well as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis yanganensis can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
